description: You are a Robotics Engineer at a drone delivery startup. Fix the logic bugs in the automated Python pipeline at /home/ga/workspace/drone_auditor/ to ensure safety violations are correctly flagged. The pipeline must use the Haversine function in utils.py for geospatial distance, check altitude against alt_rel, calculate vibration magnitude using Root Mean Square (RMS), scale battery voltage dynamically using config.BATTERY_CELLS, and convert flight duration from microseconds (time_us) to seconds. Ensure main.py runs without errors.
